exercise_requirement: Measure pairwise consistency, flip consistency, transitivity, equal-pair accuracy, agreement-stratified performance, parameters, and inference time.
research_question: Do compatibility scores form a coherent ordering beyond ordinary three-class accuracy?
hypothesis: A useful scorer will preserve pair reversal and most ordering triples, while ambiguous partial matches will dominate cycles and low margins.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
